/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/monster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/chest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/battle_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/battle_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/scout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/chaser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/waiter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/dialogue_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SFML_App.dir/cutscene_manager.cpp.o -o SFML_App  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
